description: Sector overlay for insurers, intermediaries, policyholder documents, underwriting, claims, market conduct, AML/CFT, and policyholder-protection documentation in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Insurance. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: CIMA Code and CIMA member-state insurance regulatory framework
Togo insurance market overview / CIMA Code article 326 licensing reference
primary_sources.issuer: Industry market overview citing CIMA framework

primary_sources.name: Togo investment climate statement insurance note

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and must be reviewed by qualified legal/compliance professionals.

rules.title: CIMA/DNA insurance licence or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CIMA compliance, insurer licence, DNA/local authority approval, broker authorization, or regulated insurance status.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Policyholder disclosure and contract terms evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for policy terms, exclusions, premium, coverage, claims process, surrender, cancellation, or insured-party disclosures.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Claims handling and complaints controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for claims notification, claim handling, deadlines, complaints, dispute resolution, or policyholder redress evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Insurance AML/CFT/KYC controls are documented where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for KYC, due diligence, suspicious transaction, AML/CFT, or beneficial-owner evidence in insurance documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.

rules.title: Policyholder and claims-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for personal data, policyholder data, claims data, privacy notices, consent, or confidentiality controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2019-014 relating to personal data protection
